hero.title: I turn business needs into real AI systems, in production.
hero.subtitle: And I make data speak: from raw data to decision. Automation, integrations and predictive analytics.

about.label: About
about.heading: A hybrid profile across three disciplines
about.lead: Business, technology and data in one head.
about.body: I have been building AI systems in production since late 2024, and delivering websites and web solutions since 2019. My footing is twofold: Quebec and French-speaking Africa. I work where business, technology and data meet, from generative AI to predictive analytics. It's this combination, more than any single skill, that lets me turn a need into a system that actually runs.

ai.label: AI & Automation projects
ai.heading: Systems that run, not prototypes
ai.intro: Every project starts from a real business problem and ends in production.

process.label: Design approach
process.heading: My approach: design before building
process.body: Before writing a single line of code, I modelled the existing process in BPMN 2.0 to understand every step and pinpoint the friction. I then designed the target automated process. This design discipline is what separates a reliable system from a patch-up.
process.caption: Booking process · Tipi en Fête. BPMN 2.0 modelling (Visual Paradigm).

ecosystem.label: Multi-agent architecture
ecosystem.heading: An ecosystem of 4 autonomous AI agents
ecosystem.body: Feugjay is an e-commerce store in Dakar whose marketing is fully automated. Pikachu posts daily on Facebook by selecting a real product and creating a professional marketing poster. Porygon analyzes weekly engagement and reports via Telegram. Lugia cross-references GA4, Search Console, Google Trends and WooCommerce to produce strategic intelligence. Celebi automatically optimizes product SEO listings directly in WooCommerce.
ecosystem.architectureCaption: Ecosystem architecture — flows between the 4 agents and platforms.
ecosystem.lugiaCaption: Lugia — strategic analytics report (Google Trends, GA4) via Telegram.
ecosystem.celebiCaption: Celebi — weekly SEO report with changelog, via Telegram.

data.label: Data & Analytics
data.heading: From raw data to decision
data.intro: I don't only do generative AI. I also do serious analytics.

cv.summary: Specialist in applied AI, automation and advanced analytics. I have been building AI systems in production since late 2024 and delivering websites and web solutions since 2019. A rare double expertise: generative AI and predictive analytics, from raw data to decision.
